title: Auto Shield
description: Enables automatic blocking whenever you have a shield equipped (no click required).
body:
**Tired of missing that crucial right-click? AutoShield has your back. Literally.**

AutoShield is a lightweight Minecraft mod that automatically blocks incoming damage as long as you have a shield equipped in your left hand, no need to hold right-click. Whether you're farming, fighting, or just munching on a steak, your shield will raise itself to intercept projectiles. ONLY PROJECTILES lol. 

Notes:
- Develop for Minecraft **Fabric**
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer (as long as the server has it)
